name: Cargo Winch Delivery Configuration
description: As a Medical Drone Operator, configure a vehicle for emergency tether winch delivery based on the operations brief at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/winch_ops_brief.txt. Set the three winch parameters specified in the brief and generate a mission plan consisting of a takeoff, transit to the delivery zone, a winch deployment (DO_WINCH command 42600), a delay (NAV_DELAY), winch retraction, and a return to launch (RTL). Export the mission plan to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/winch_delivery.plan.
